mapper.sql: FROM student s INNER JOIN sys_user u ON s.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN `class` c ON s.class_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE s.deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.student_no, u.real_name AS realName, s.gender, s.class_id, c.name AS className
AND s.class_id = #{classId}
AND u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY s.id DESC

SELECT s.id, s.user_id, s.student_no, u.real_name AS realName, s.gender, s.birth_date, s.class_id, c.name AS className, s.create_time
AND s.id = #{id}
